whatIDo.name: Language
whatIDo.detail: Proficient in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, with a strong grasp of semantic structure, styling techniques, and dynamic interactions. Solid foundation in TypeScript for scalable and type-safe frontend development.

whatIDo.name: Frameworks
whatIDo.detail: Comfortable working with React and Next.js for building modern web applications. Experienced in using Redux for state management, Tailwind CSS and Bootstrap for UI styling, and Webpack for optimized builds.

whatIDo.name: Ability
whatIDo.detail: Confident in building responsive websites, interactive dashboards, single-page applications, and landing pages. Skilled in translating designs from Figma into pixel-perfect implementations with real functionality.
